    • SBOM for R Package Repositories (renv + GitHub Actions)
  • Changelog

Workflow template for SBOM generation (R packages)

sbom_workflow_template_r.Rd

Returns the GitHub Actions workflow YAML text used by use_sbom().

Usage

sbom_workflow_template_r()

Value

A single character string containing the YAML workflow.

Details

  • Uses Anchore's SBOM Action (Syft-based) to generate an SBOM (default: SPDX JSON).

  • Writes SBOM-adjacent environment metadata via reproducibleai::write_sbom_env().

  • Uploads the artifacts/sbom/ directory as a single artifact bundle with 120-day retention (subject to org/repo policy).

On this page
